issues.detail: Skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, only happy path.

scenarios.name: custom-login-command
scenarios.rationale: Response A implements the required command and test logic, though it omits aliasing and waiting, whereas Response B fails to meet key rubric items such as command name, aliasing, waiting, and selector usage.

scenarios.name: ci-parallel-recording
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B is incomplete and missing key elements.
